option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Landscape variant: weatherLayout=ConstraintLayout, newsLayout=FrameLayout --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/mainConstLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/waitingLogo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:src="@mipmap/app_icon" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/adImageView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.exoplayer2.ui.PlayerView android:id="@+id/adPlayerView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:resize_mode="fill" app:use_controller="false" />
<!-- ── WEATHER SLIDE (landscape): left=clock, right=temp, bottom=metrics ── --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/weatherLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_weather_slide" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/v_center" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.50" /> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/h_metrics" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.78" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/location_row" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/slide_padding" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/slide_padding" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/baseline_location_pin_24" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/weatherLoc" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="London" android:textColor="#6EA8D4" android:textSize="@dimen/text_location" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/timeNow" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/slide_padding" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="15:05" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_time" android:textStyle="bold" android:gravity="center" android:includeFontPadding="false" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/location_row" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics" />
<View android:id="@+id/v_divider" android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/temp_block" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/slide_padding" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics"> <ImageView android:id="@+id/currentWeatherImg" android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/weatherTemp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="24°C" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_temp" android:textStyle="bold" android:includeFontPadding="false" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/currentStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Sunny" android:textColor="#7BA3CC" android:textSize="@dimen/text_condition" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/h_divider" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/slide_padding" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/slide_padding" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/metrics_bar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/h_divider" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/wind" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/windW" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="32" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="km/h" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> <View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/humidity" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/hamudity" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="60" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="%" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> <View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/umbrella" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/rain" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="5" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="mm" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- ── NEWS SLIDE (landscape): left=image+headline, right=description ── --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/newsLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#0D1117" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout android:id="@+id/shimmer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:visibility="gone"> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A202C" /> </com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/newsFrame" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Left: image + badge + headline --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1"> <ImageView android:id="@+id/news_img" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/background_port" /> <View android:id="@+id/header_background" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:background="@drawable/gradient_news_overlay" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/newsTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="top|start" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_news_badge" android:letterSpacing="0.12" android:paddingStart="14dp" android:paddingEnd="14dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="NEWS" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_label" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/main_header" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.15" android:paddingStart="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingBottom="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:text="Breaking news headline" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_headline" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Right: description --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="#13182B" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingTop="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/news_details" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="6" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" android:text="News description" android:textColor="#D0D8E8" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_desc" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/qrCodeImage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_margin="5dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:contentDescription="QR Code" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.95" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/logoImage" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:src="@drawable/final_logo" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/displayText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="20dp" android:ellipsize="marquee" android:focusable="true" android:focusableInTouchMode="true" android:gravity="center" android:marqueeRepeatLimit="marquee_forever" android:scrollHorizontally="true" android:singleLine="true" android:text="Advert is Here" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="19sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/loadBar" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/progressText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Updating..." android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="25sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loadBar" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <!-- Landscape variant: weatherLayout=ConstraintLayout, newsLayout=FrameLayout --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/mainConstLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/waitingLogo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:src="@mipmap/app_icon" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/adImageView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.exoplayer2.ui.PlayerView android:id="@+id/adPlayerView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:resize_mode="fill" app:use_controller="false" />
<!-- ── WEATHER SLIDE (landscape): left=clock, right=temp, bottom=metrics ── --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/weatherLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_weather_slide" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/v_center" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.50" /> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/h_metrics" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.78" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/location_row" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/slide_padding" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/slide_padding" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/baseline_location_pin_24" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/weatherLoc" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="London" android:textColor="#6EA8D4" android:textSize="@dimen/text_location" android:textStyle="bold" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/timeNow" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/slide_padding" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:text="15:05" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_time" android:textStyle="bold" android:gravity="center" android:includeFontPadding="false" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/location_row" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics" />
<View android:id="@+id/v_divider" android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/temp_block" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/slide_padding" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/v_center" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics"> <ImageView android:id="@+id/currentWeatherImg" android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/weatherTemp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="24°C" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_temp" android:textStyle="bold" android:includeFontPadding="false" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/currentStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="Sunny" android:textColor="#7BA3CC" android:textSize="@dimen/text_condition" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/h_divider" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/slide_padding" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/slide_padding" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/h_metrics" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/metrics_bar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/h_divider" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/wind" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/windW" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="32" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="km/h" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> <View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/humidity" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/hamudity" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="60" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="%" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> <View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center"> <ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/umbrella" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/rain" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="5" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="mm" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<!-- ── NEWS SLIDE (landscape): left=image+headline, right=description ── --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/newsLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#0D1117" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout android:id="@+id/shimmer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:visibility="gone"> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A202C" /> </com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/newsFrame" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- Left: image + badge + headline --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1"> <ImageView android:id="@+id/news_img" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/background_port" /> <View android:id="@+id/header_background" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:background="@drawable/gradient_news_overlay" android:scaleY="0.4" android:translationY="60dp" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/newsTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="top|start" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_news_badge" android:letterSpacing="0.12" android:paddingStart="14dp" android:paddingEnd="14dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="NEWS" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_label" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/main_header" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.15" android:paddingStart="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingBottom="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:text="Breaking news headline" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_headline" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<!-- Right: description --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="#13182B" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:paddingTop="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/news_details" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="6" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" android:text="News description" android:textColor="#D0D8E8" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_desc" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/qrCodeImage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_margin="5dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:contentDescription="QR Code" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.95" />
<ImageView android:id="@+id/logoImage" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:src="@drawable/final_logo" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/displayText" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="20dp" android:ellipsize="marquee" android:focusable="true" android:focusableInTouchMode="true" android:gravity="center" android:marqueeRepeatLimit="marquee_forever" android:scrollHorizontally="true" android:singleLine="true" android:text="Advert is Here" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="19sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/loadBar" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/progressText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Updating..." android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="25sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loadBar" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/mainConstLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Waiting / splash logo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/waitingLogo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:rotation="-90" android:src="@mipmap/app_icon" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Ad image view --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/adImageView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:rotation="180" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Ad video player --> <com.google.android.exoplayer2.ui.PlayerView android:id="@+id/adPlayerView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:rotation="180" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/adImageView" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/adImageView" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/adImageView" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/adImageView" app:resize_mode="fill" app:surface_type="texture_view" app:use_controller="false" />
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ WEATHER SLIDE — landscape (device mounted portrait, content rotated -90°) Two equal halves side-by-side, each rotated -90° so content reads upright Left half: clock | Right half: icon + temp + metrics ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/weatherLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_weather_slide" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<!-- LEFT HALF — location + giant clock (rotated -90°) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Location row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:paddingBottom="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/baseline_location_pin_24" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/weatherLoc" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="London" android:textColor="#6EA8D4" android:textSize="@dimen/text_location" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Giant clock --> <TextView android:id="@+id/timeNow" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="15:05" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_time" android:textStyle="bold" android:gravity="center" android:includeFontPadding="false" />
<!-- Condition --> <TextView android:id="@+id/currentStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Sunny" android:textColor="#7BA3CC" android:textSize="@dimen/text_condition" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- RIGHT HALF — icon + temp + metrics (rotated -90°) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Icon + temperature row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/currentWeatherImg" android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/weatherTemp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="24°C" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_temp" android:textStyle="bold" android:includeFontPadding="false" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Thin divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Metrics row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Wind --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/storm" android:tint="#90A4AE" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/windW" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="32" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="km/h" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Humidity --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/humidity" android:tint="#90A4AE" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/hamudity" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="60" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="%" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Rain --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/rainy" android:tint="#90A4AE" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/rain" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="5" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="mm" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ NEWS SLIDE — landscape Left half: image with headline | Right half: description Both halves rotated -90° for mounted portrait device ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/newsLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#0D1117" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<!-- Shimmer (spans full width, GONE when content is ready) --> <com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout android:id="@+id/shimmer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="0" android:visibility="gone"> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A202C" /> </com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout>
<!-- LEFT HALF — "NEWS" badge + image + headline (rotated -90°) --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1">
<!-- Inner content rotated -90° --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Full-bleed image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/news_img" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/background_port" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Dark gradient at bottom of image --> <View android:id="@+id/header_background" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/gradient_news_overlay" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHeight_default="percent" app:layout_constraintHeight_percent="0.50" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="1.0" />
<!-- "NEWS" pill badge — top-left of image --> <TextView android:id="@+id/newsTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="14dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_news_badge" android:letterSpacing="0.12" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="5dp" android:paddingBottom="5dp" android:text="NEWS" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_label" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- RIGHT HALF — headline + description (rotated -90°) --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/newsFrame" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="#13182B">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Headline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/main_headerF" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:gravity="start" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.15" android:maxLines="3" android:paddingBottom="12dp" android:text="Breaking news headline" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_headline" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Thin separator --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Description --> <TextView android:id="@+id/news_detailsF" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:gravity="start" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" android:maxLines="5" android:text="News description goes here" android:textColor="#D0D8E8" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_desc" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- QR code (top-right corner, visible over ad slides) --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/qrCodeImage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_margin="5dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:contentDescription="QR Code" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.95" />
<!-- Brand logo (bottom-right) --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/logoImage" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:rotation="-90" android:src="@drawable/final_logo" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- Scrolling display text overlay --> <TextView android:id="@+id/displayText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:maxLines="3" android:rotation="-90" android:text="Advert is Here" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:translationX="-10dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Loading indicator --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/loadBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/progressText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Updating..." android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loadBar" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/mainConstLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Waiting / splash logo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/waitingLogo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:rotation="-90" android:src="@mipmap/app_icon" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Ad image view --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/adImageView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:rotation="180" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Ad video player --> <com.google.android.exoplayer2.ui.PlayerView android:id="@+id/adPlayerView" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:rotation="180" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/adImageView" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/adImageView" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/adImageView" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/adImageView" app:resize_mode="fill" app:surface_type="texture_view" app:use_controller="false" />
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ WEATHER SLIDE — landscape (device mounted portrait, content rotated -90°) Two equal halves side-by-side, each rotated -90° so content reads upright Left half: clock | Right half: icon + temp + metrics ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/weatherLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_weather_slide" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<!-- LEFT HALF — location + giant clock (rotated -90°) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Location row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:paddingBottom="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/baseline_location_pin_24" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/weatherLoc" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:text="London" android:textColor="#6EA8D4" android:textSize="@dimen/text_location" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Giant clock --> <TextView android:id="@+id/timeNow" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="15:05" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_time" android:textStyle="bold" android:gravity="center" android:includeFontPadding="false" />
<!-- Condition --> <TextView android:id="@+id/currentStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Sunny" android:textColor="#7BA3CC" android:textSize="@dimen/text_condition" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- RIGHT HALF — icon + temp + metrics (rotated -90°) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="vertical" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Icon + temperature row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/currentWeatherImg" android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_icon_size" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/weatherTemp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="24°C" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_temp" android:textStyle="bold" android:includeFontPadding="false" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Thin divider --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Metrics row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Wind --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/storm" android:tint="#90A4AE" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/windW" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="32" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="km/h" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Humidity --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/humidity" android:tint="#90A4AE" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/hamudity" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="60" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="%" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="1dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/metric_divider_height" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Rain --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:layout_width="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/weather_metric_icon_size" android:src="@drawable/rainy" android:tint="#90A4AE" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/rain" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="5" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_metrics" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="mm" android:textColor="#546E7A" android:textSize="@dimen/text_label" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ NEWS SLIDE — landscape Left half: image with headline | Right half: description Both halves rotated -90° for mounted portrait device ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/newsLayout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="#0D1117" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<!-- Shimmer (spans full width, GONE when content is ready) --> <com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout android:id="@+id/shimmer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="0" android:visibility="gone"> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A202C" /> </com.facebook.shimmer.ShimmerFrameLayout>
<!-- LEFT HALF — "NEWS" badge + image + headline (rotated -90°) --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1">
<!-- Inner content rotated -90° --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Full-bleed image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/news_img" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@mipmap/background_port" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Dark gradient at bottom of image --> <View android:id="@+id/header_background" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/gradient_news_overlay" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHeight_default="percent" app:layout_constraintHeight_percent="0.50" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="1.0" />
<!-- "NEWS" pill badge — top-left of image --> <TextView android:id="@+id/newsTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="14dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_news_badge" android:letterSpacing="0.12" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="5dp" android:paddingBottom="5dp" android:text="NEWS" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_label" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- RIGHT HALF — headline + description (rotated -90°) --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/newsFrame" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="#13182B">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="@dimen/news_text_padding" android:rotation="-90">
<!-- Headline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/main_headerF" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:gravity="start" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.15" android:maxLines="3" android:paddingBottom="12dp" android:text="Breaking news headline" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_headline" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- Thin separator --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
<!-- Description --> <TextView android:id="@+id/news_detailsF" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:gravity="start" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" android:maxLines="5" android:text="News description goes here" android:textColor="#D0D8E8" android:textSize="@dimen/text_news_desc" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- QR code (top-right corner, visible over ad slides) --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/qrCodeImage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_margin="5dp" android:adjustViewBounds="true" android:contentDescription="QR Code" android:scaleType="fitCenter" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.95" />
<!-- Brand logo (bottom-right) --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/logoImage" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:rotation="-90" android:src="@drawable/final_logo" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- Scrolling display text overlay --> <TextView android:id="@+id/displayText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:maxLines="3" android:rotation="-90" android:text="Advert is Here" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:translationX="-10dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Loading indicator --> <ProgressBar android:id="@+id/loadBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/progressText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Updating..." android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loadBar" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
